<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Voice\Endpoint; class VBC implements EndpointInterface { public function __construct(protected string $id) { } public static function factory(string $extension): VBC { return new VBC($extension); } /** * @return array{type: string, user: string} */ public function jsonSerialize(): array { return $this->toArray(); } /** * @return array{type: string, user: string} */ public function toArray(): array { return [ 'type' => 'vbc', 'extension' => $this->id, ]; } public function getId(): string { return $this->id; } }
